affected_pattern: Subscription charges appear once under 'recurring' and once under 'daily' on the same invoice
root_cause: Daily and monthly schedulers both activated for the same service — a migration from daily-prorated to monthly-fixed billing left the daily job enabled in production, emitting charges on both schedules.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Dual-Scheduler Migration Gap pattern
Cron table shows both monthly_billing.sh and daily_billing.sh enabled for the affected plan
Migration runbook step 'disable daily scheduler' marked incomplete
recommended_action: Disable the daily scheduler for migrated plans immediately
Reverse the daily-component charges on affected invoices
Add a runbook checklist gate in the deployment system
Emit a billing-scheduler metric and alert when > 1 scheduler per plan is active
